title: Top history educator receives third award
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"GRAAFF-REINET NEWS - Retired educator Mvuleni Mhlana of Nqweba Secondary School recently received an award at the Sadtu Eastern Cape Provincial Awards for being the top history teacher - for the third time.","html":"GRAAFF-REINET NEWS - Retired educator Mvuleni Mhlana of Nqweba Secondary School recently received an award at the Sadtu Eastern Cape Provincial Awards for being the top history teacher - for the third time."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The awards were held at the International Convention Centre in East London."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Mhlana had rendered his services at Nqweba Secondary, giving 39 years of unwavering commitment to the education sector.","html":"Mhlana had rendered his services at Nqweba Secondary, giving 39 years of unwavering commitment to the education sector."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"He officially retired from his role at the school in December, marking the end of a remarkable career.","html":"He officially retired from his role at the school in December, marking the end of a remarkable career."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Mhlana was awarded once again as one of the top candidates in the subject history.","html":"Mhlana was awarded once again as one of the top candidates in the subject history."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The first time was in 2019 with 100%, the second in 2023 with 95%, and now, for 2024, he received 96.6%.","html":"The first time was in 2019 with 100%, the second in 2023 with 95%, and now, for 2024, he received 96.6%."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The top candidates were selected from each region for each subject. They had to go through a thorough process.","html":"The top candidates were selected from each region for each subject. They had to go through a thorough process."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Only 12 managed to go through to the end in the history category, Mhlana being one of them.","html":"Only 12 managed to go through to the end in the history category, Mhlana being one of them."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Top history educator receives third award
